# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t1 = ADD 5, 3
      a_1 = t1
      t2 = SUB 10, 4
      b_1 = t2
      t3 = MUL 6, 7
      c_1 = t3
      t4 = DIV 20, 4
      d_1 = t4
      t5 = MOD 17, 5
      e_1 = t5
      t6 = ADD a_1, b_1
      t7 = MUL c_1, d_1
      t8 = DIV t7, e_1
      t9 = SUB t6, t8
      RETURN t9
